root_text.an5.224:1.3: Āvāsamaccharī hoti, kulamaccharī hoti, lābhamaccharī hoti, vaṇṇamaccharī hoti, dhammamaccharī hoti.
root_text.an5.224:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā atinivāse.
root_text.an5.224:2.3: Na āvāsamaccharī hoti, na kulamaccharī hoti, na lābhamaccharī hoti, na vaṇṇamaccharī hoti, na dhammamaccharī hoti.
root_text.an5.224:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā samavatthavāse”ti.

translation_text.an5.224:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks of overstaying.
translation_text.an5.224:1.3: You become stingy with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teaching.
translation_text.an5.224:1.4: These are the five drawbacks of overstaying.
translation_text.an5.224:2.1: There are these five benefits of staying for a reasonable length of time.
translation_text.an5.224:2.3: You’re not stingy with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teaching.
translation_text.an5.224:2.4: These are the five benefits of staying for a reasonable length of time.”
